component.name: BATorrent
component.summary: BitTorrent client with a VPN kill switch

description.p: BATorrent is a BitTorrent client built with Qt 6 and libtorrent. It downloads and seeds torrents and magnet links, and adds privacy and automation features for people who run a VPN or use private trackers.

ul.li: A kill switch that stops all traffic if the VPN drops, bound to a chosen network interface
A private-tracker mode that turns off DHT, PEX and local peer discovery per torrent
RSS auto-downloading with filters, including presets for anime feeds
A built-in web interface that pairs with a phone through a QR code
Cover art and synopses for movies, shows and games, shown in a poster grid
Desktop, Telegram and Discord notifications when a download finishes or fails
An interface translated into seven languages

description.p: It shows no ads, collects no telemetry, and needs no account.

screenshot.caption: The main window in the dark theme
The main window in the light theme
Per-torrent details, with peers and file priorities

description.p: The interface has been rebuilt in Qt Quick. This release also adds:

ul.li: Custom theme profiles with optional background images, alongside five built-in themes
A poster grid that fetches cover art and synopses for movies, shows and games
GeoIP country flags for connected peers
A reworked startup animation and a richer system-tray popup

description.p: Per-torrent peer blocking, faster system-language detection, and protection against running out of disk space.
Private-tracker mode, Telegram and Discord notifications, QR pairing for the web interface, a torrent inspector, tags, and seven-language support.
